question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists the main sections of the thesis clearly and concisely.

question: Description
feedback: Each section is briefly described, providing a clear understanding of its content. However, some descriptions could be more detailed to give a better idea of what will be covered in each chapter.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be easily understood from this text as it follows a logical sequence and provides an overview of all sections. However, adding a sentence or two about how these sections relate to each other could make the structure even clearer.
